cards.hook: Crypto's next phase isn't scarcity — it's yield.
cards.caption: Crypto's next phase isn't scarcity — it's cashflow. Protocols like AAVE now act like yield-bearing equities, not lottery tickets. The shift my feed caught before the timeline did.
cards.stance: The store-of-value era is ending; DeFi is quietly becoming investment-grade.

cards.hook: DeFi has huge brand awareness — and almost zero users.
cards.caption: DeFi has massive brand awareness and almost zero real usage. Everyone's heard of it; few actually touch it. The gap nobody wants to admit — surfaced from my curated feed.
cards.stance: DeFi's hype-to-usage ratio is the real bubble.

cards.hook: What's the real return on 10 DeFi protocols?
cards.caption: A plain-text medium link with no data preview or payoff — weak visual, no hook. Skipping.

cards.hook: Crowdfunding meets DeFi rewards for creators.
cards.caption: A truncated Show HN pitch with no payoff or proof — reads like an unfinished ask. Not strong enough to repost. Skipping.

cards.hook: Terra becomes the second-largest DeFi chain.
cards.caption: This is a 2022-era Terra headline before the collapse — reposting it now reads as tone-deaf or misleading. Skipping.

cards.hook: DeFi hacks are now a $780M hidden tax on your yield.
cards.caption: DeFi hacks cost investors $780M in Q2 alone — bridge exploits and key failures quietly eat your returns as a security tax. The risk your APY chart never shows you.
cards.stance: Your DeFi yield isn't yield until you subtract the exploit tax.

cards.hook: See the real historical yield of every DeFi protocol.
cards.caption: Stop trusting the advertised APY — this tool plots the actual realized yield of DeFi protocols side by side. The receipts your dashboard hides. Found before the timeline.
cards.stance: Advertised APY is marketing; realized yield is the truth.

cards.hook: Aave is going after a $4.6T market TradFi thought was safe.
cards.caption: Aave's V4 is bridging TradFi and DeFi — targeting a $4.6T tokenized-securities market and automating buybacks via Aavenomics. The move my feed flagged early.
cards.stance: Tokenized securities, not memecoins, are DeFi's real endgame.
